title: senecillis latihastata
intro: Senecillis latihastata, also known as Groundsel Bush, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its yellow flowers and small, rounded leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, to reduce fever, and to treat various skin conditions. The health benefits of Groundsel Bush include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Groundsel Bush is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies due to potential toxicity and side effects.
